positive: A minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a group of stylized woodland creatures (fox, rabbit, owl) interacting with glowing, bioluminescent flora and interconnected tree roots. The composition is centered and balanced, utilizing negative space effectively. The style is modern, clean graphic design with strong silhouettes, reminiscent of Scandinavian folk art combined with ethereal fantasy. Use limited, harmonious colors: deep emerald greens, burnt ochre, slate blue, and pops of soft neon cyan for the bioluminescence. High contrast, two-dimensional look perfect for screen printing on apparel. Rule of thirds applied to major elements. Clean lines, no gradients, high fidelity.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, lowres, artifacts, disfigured, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, jpeg artifacts, gradients, photorealistic, 3d render, excessive detail
